name: ggen
description: ggen plugins for Claude Code — author-time language intelligence for the ggen specification-driven code-generation pipeline.

plugins.name: ggen-lsp
plugins.description: ggen language server: live diagnostics, completion, hover, definitions, references, document/workspace symbols, formatting, and repair-route code actions for ggen law surfaces (RDF .ttl/.nt/.nq, SPARQL .rq/.sparql, Tera .tera, and ggen.toml).
